Flagship Programme
🛣️
Photo: Itirele Programme site — aerial road works
Roads & Transport · Community & Youth Development
National Youth Service Itirele Programme
North West Province, South Africa
R1.2B
Programme Value

A landmark Community-Based Programme combining routine road maintenance with large-scale youth skills development. Targeting 1,200+ young people within the Departments of Public Works and Roads, this initiative embodies Aseda's "Business as Social" philosophy — turning essential service delivery into a high-impact youth empowerment engine.

Client
Dept. of Public Works & Roads, NW
Province
North West
Youth Trained

Jobs Target
